name: The White House
subject: Mike Pompeo is the top diplomat America needs
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=eb089939307692721c5380711ea92118a54146a1aac009e6454c57a3fbd7811b5962f02141cf8b567a21048ad07beb4fbb7c7cd72d534779) The White House • April 13, 2018
## Driving the Day
Vice President Mike Pence departed Washington, D.C., this morning to represent the United States at the Opening Ceremony of the eighth Summit of the Americas in Peru. Before the summit, the Vice President will meet with Venezuelan opposition leaders at the residence of the U.S. Ambassador in Peru. |
---
|

## Mike Pompeo is the top diplomat America needs
**CIA Director Mike Pompeo believes that leadership is about results**. And for the past 14 months, those results have been exemplary. From pressuring North Korea to dismantling ISIS, some of the Trump Administration’s biggest foreign policy accomplishments wouldn’t have been possible without CIA support under the watch of Director Pompeo.
**Pompeo’s successes come from proven experience**. He has been privy to some of America’s toughest national security challenges since 2010, when he served on the House Intelligence Committee as a freshman member of Congress. He’s had stints as a U.S. Cavalry officer, an entrepreneur, an executive—even as Editor of Harvard Law Review.
**His storied career adds up to one certainty** : Mike Pompeo will be ready to lead the State Department on day one. With the grave threats facing our country, America needs him as our next Secretary of State.
**More** : [Why Mike Pompeo is the leader America needs as its top diplomat ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=eb08993930769272e5f163d6cbb81b3d2b36a74e8b9c3e4f64521febf8d9ce9a4e4ae62dcbf99dfc6b036f676253b304b069a22aefbb1046)

---
|

## Tax cuts are energizing employers of all sizes
**President Trump shared big news from the Rose Garden yesterday**. Optimism among American manufacturers has reached unprecedented levels, according to a new survey from a leading industry group. Manufacturer optimism stood at 93.5 percent, the second highest reading in the survey’s history.
**Even better news is what that means for workers**. The same survey showed that manufacturers anticipate wages will grow at the fastest pace in 17 years. “All you used to hear is that we’re losing our manufacturing jobs; jobs are being taken out of the country,” President Trump said yesterday. “They’re coming back and they’re coming back fast.”
**Other major reports tell the same story**. Small businesses across sectors are worrying less about taxes and are investing more in their workers, according to a National Federation of Independent Businesses survey last month. And Ernst & Young reports that 89 percent of executives say their companies plan to increase worker compensation as a result of tax cuts.
[See how President Trump’s tax cuts are energizing American employers of all sizes. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=eb089939307692727d5b12aef21be97bc3a1a7da9bec4970622e7c2f17a9ac6f9ce6cb2eef911776f3ac8a0135b9392a4b55ec6583038b8d)

---
|

Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
President Donald J. Trump delivers remarks on Tax Reform to American Workers

name: Ben Jealous, The Sanders Institute
subject: It's time to dream big again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE SANDERS INSTITUTE
body:
#
Friend,
I am a Founding Fellow of the Sanders Institue and I'm asking you to join us. Here's why. In my campaign for Governor of Maryland, I've met folks from Western Maryland, to the shore, to Baltimore City. Each and every one wants the same things for their families and themselves: good paying jobs, great teachers in every classroom, access to affordable healthcare, the opportunity to grow their businesses, and to earn a decent wage.
The ways in which to achieve a better life may vary from state to state, but the hope that we can accomplish a better life for all is diminishing across the country.
The belief that we can't fix what's broken, that we can't stop those that try to take from the many to give to the few, is understandable. But I believe we are capable when we aren't afraid to dream again--when we challenge ourselves and our state's leadership to act boldly and swiftly to build a government that is more accountable and responsive to the needs of its people.
This is where the Sanders Institute comes in.
By pursuing their mission of providing bold, progressive solutions to economic, environmental, racial, and social justice issues, the Sanders Institute is already making an impact. One that will not be short-lived. They can't do this without your support though. **[Can you join me in contributing to the Sanders Institute so they can make sure more are inspired by a progressive vision for America?](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7ac25/bed43eb/55e00868/75fe7992/3230307054/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sandersinstitute?refcode=em180413")**
We need big ideas to make sure we can dream big again. If we spend the time to communicate and inspire the very communities that are often ignored, we can win, and we can win big. Because in a democracy, the people can win every time--but only if we dare to organize behind the universal values we all share.
There are a lot of different interpretations of what it means to be a progressive. To me, being a progressive means that you believe we need to make progress for all, regardless of who they are, and where they come from. The work the Sanders Institute is doing--on health care, student debt, voting rights, climate change and so much more--is tantamount to ensuring progress is possible.
Please join us!
Sincerely,
Ben Jealous

name: Ben Jealous
subject: The cost to our country
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
#
Friend.
Wednesday night, I was in Prince George's County with my good friend, Senator Cory Booker, to discuss my plan to build a movement for comprehensive criminal justice reform.
[](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a7b3/7ab0e2c4/7faba2d5/349a62ff/1551628161/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiT0hRMDQxMzhBIn0=/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/criminal-justice-reform-plan?source=OHQ04138A")
For the past 40 years, the number of incarcerated Americans has grown by more than 500%1. While only 5 percent of the world's population, America is home to as much as a quarter of the world's prison population: we incarcerate our citizens at the highest rate in the world.
The rise of mass incarceration has cost our country precious financial resources. As we've invested more in prisons, we've seen less and less investment going into crime prevention programs, education, and our communities have not gotten any safer.
**[If you believe that being smart on crime will achieve safer communities and create greater opportunities for increased investment in education and other areas over time and without compromising public safety, add your name in support of my plan today.](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a7b3/7ab0e2c4/7faba2d5/349a62ff/1551628161/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiT0hRMDQxMzhBIn0=/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/criminal-justice-reform-plan?source=OHQ04138A")**
As governor, I'll further our efforts to bringing real reforms to our state by:
* Introducing gun courts to quickly and more efficiently adjudicate gun crimes, removing violent repeat offenders from our streets.
* Expanding the use of violence interruption programs.
* Ending cash bail, so that the only criteria for release is whether or not the person is a public safety threat, not whether or not they could afford to post bail.
* Legalizing marijuana for adult use, effectively ending a major pipeline of nonviolent low-level drug offenders into our prisons.
* Supporting those currently incarcerated with more opportunities to turn their lives around while finishing their sentences.
* And creating an office dedicated to helping the formerly incarcerated navigate a complex system which makes it difficult for those most in need to access basic services like housing, employment, and expungement programs.

[**My plan will make Maryland safer and begin to bring about an end to this era of mass incarceration, which has wasted millions of taxpayer dollars and disproportionately harmed women and communities of color and failed to keep us safe. If you support our plan, add your name here today.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a7b3/7ab0e2c4/7faba2d5/349a62ff/1551628161/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiT0hRMDQxMzhBIn0=/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/criminal-justice-reform-plan?source=OHQ04138A")
I'll lead much more aggressively in this area than perhaps any governor Maryland has ever had. We have the opportunity here in Maryland to get big things done on criminal justice reform and when I'm governor, we will.
Onward,
Ben

name: Jason Yates
subject: Special Presidential Authority
body:
Peter,
Have you heard of rescission authority?
It’s a powerful tool President Trump has the ability to use to cancel wasteful spending passed in the 1.3 trillion dollar budget.
This special presidential power, created by the Congressional Budget and Impoundment Control Act, allows the President to submit a proposal to cancel specific portions of the bill’s funds. The proposal is then sent to both chambers of Congress who must affirmatively agree to the proposal within 45 days or all the funds will be spent as appropriated in the budget bill.
President Reagan used this rescission power numerous times. Ultimately Reagan proposed over 500 rescissions and Congress approved 213 of Reagan’s rescissions saving over $16 billion American tax dollars.
Since Republicans still control the House and the Senate it is very likely that President Trump’s rescissions would receive the needed support to pass Congress.
The Impoundment Control Act of 1974 limits debate in the Senate on any rescission bill to no more than 10 hours. This is important because it is in the Senate where the filibuster is often used to avoid taking a vote.
President Trump could not only use this power to curb wasteful spending out of the budget bill, but he could also use this power to defund Planned Parenthood. A direct promise the President made to the American people.
[Do you think President Trump should use the rescission power?](http://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180413srv01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180413srv01&n=1)
[](http://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p180413srv01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180413srv01&n=2)
I look forward to hearing your responses!
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO

The proposal is then sent to both chambers of Congress who must affirmatively agree to the proposal within 45 days or all the funds will be spent as appropriated in the budget bill. President Reagan used this rescission power numerous times. Ultimately Reagan proposed over 500 rescissions and Congress approved 213 of Reagan’s rescissions saving over $16 billion American tax dollars. Since Republicans still control the House and the Senate it is very likely that President Trump’s rescissions would receive the needed support to pass Congress. The Impoundment Control Act of 1974 limits debate in the Senate on any rescission bill to no more than 10 hours. This is important because it is in the Senate where the filibuster is often used to avoid taking a vote. President Trump could not only use this power to curb wasteful spending out of the budget bill, but he could also use this power to defund Planned Parenthood. A direct promise the President made to the American people. I look forward to hearing your responses! United. We Stand. Jason Yates CEO ©2018 My Faith Votes 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

Friends,

From the Three-Fifths Compromise, which counted slaves as less than a whole person, to taking away the voting rights of felons even after they've paid their debt to our state, our country has not always lived up to its founding promises of equality.

So when Trump's Department of Commerce announced a new question regarding whether a person is a U.S. citizen will be on the 2020 census, it set off alarm bells. This new question is another tactic to intimidate Americans, and especially people of color.

[**I refuse to sit by and witness these unjust actions and you shouldn 't either. Add your name now and join me in demanding the Trump administration reverse their decision immediately.**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3111/9e00690/4403d9fe/24027286/928192536/VEsE/ "https://act.makechangewith.us/page/s/sign-the-census-should-not-be-politicized-gillum?utm_campaign=em18__cenja1_adv_gq_act__GILLUM&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&source=em18__cenja1_adv_gq_act__GILLUM&utm_content=2+-+I+refuse+to+sit+by+and+witness+these+unj")

This question is intended to frighten people, citizens or not, into being too scared of deportation or government action to be counted. It will lead to an inaccurate count of the population, with harmful consequences, including even more gerrymandered districts.

The census is how we allocate resources and decide where to invest; when it's unbalanced and unfairly rigged, our communities will suffer.

[**Those of us who have the power to stand up and be heard, must do so in order to protect our communities -- add your name now.**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3111/9e00690/4403d9fe/24027299/928192536/VEsF/ "https://act.makechangewith.us/page/s/sign-the-census-should-not-be-politicized-gillum?utm_campaign=em18__cenja1_adv_gq_act__GILLUM&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&source=em18__cenja1_adv_gq_act__GILLUM&utm_content=3+-+Those+of+us+who+have+the+power+to+stand+")

Thank you,

Andrew

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: we must stand together on this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
Today's presidential pardon of former Dick Cheney Chief of Staff Scooter Libby is a sobering reminder of President Trump's attitude toward the rule of law (in case we needed a reminder). Libby's crimes -- perjury before a grand jury, lying to FBI investigators and obstruction of justice -- are very much at the center of our current domestic political crisis, and there is little doubt that Trump's decision to issue a pardon was considered in that context.

In recent days we've seen growing warning signs that President Trump may be preparing to find a way to fire Special Counsel Mueller as the independent investigation into foreign meddling in the 2016 presidential election heats up.

Such a firing would create an unprecedented constitutional crisis, and there is no evidence that Republicans would stand up to defend the rule of law if this occurs.

[**The time to be heard is now. Congressional Republicans must commit publicly to protect the integrity of our democracy and tell President Trump that they will not look the other way if he interferes with the Russia investigation. Add your name if you agree. >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de9184e/70cdc2ba/4617ea2f/39035ae/848431933/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/protect-the-integrity-of-our-democracy-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+The+time+to+be+heard+is+now+Congressiona&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180413_1_1&source=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180413_1_1")

The truth is that the world won't stop and wait for our domestic political earthquake to pass. Our government, at the highest levels, must be able to function competently enough to address serious national security challenges should they arise.

In fact, a number of critical issues are pending on the president's desk at this moment, including his stated decision regarding U.S. military action in Syria, talks with North Korea over its nuclear program, rising trade tensions with China, and the upcoming Iran sanctions waiver deadline -- just to name a few.

Americans, irrespective of party, don't want to see our country hobbled by a constitutional crisis launched by the president of the United States.

[**We must stand together to put patriotism over**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de9184e/70cdc2ba/4617ea2f/39035af/848431933/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/protect-the-integrity-of-our-democracy-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+We+must+stand+together+to+put+patriotism&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180413_1_1&source=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180413_1_1")[**party**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de9184e/70cdc2ba/4617ea2f/39035ac/848431933/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/protect-the-integrity-of-our-democracy-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+party&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180413_1_1&source=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180413_1_1")[**to make it clear that President Trump must respect the law and not fire Mueller >>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de9184e/70cdc2ba/4617ea2f/39035ad/848431933/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/protect-the-integrity-of-our-democracy-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-++to+make+it+clear+that+President+Trump+m&utm_campaign=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180413_1_1&source=CVH_EM_EOM_FULL_180413_1_1")

Our democracy is stronger than any president, and together we will overcome this crisis.

Chris Van Hollen
U.S. Senator

**_A Note From Jeanie_**
**Dear Derek,**

**As Governor Sununu says, New Hampshire Republicans get the job done! **

**Wednesday night we had our first open house at NHGOP HQ for those interested in running for office. We had a great turnout! I’m pleased to say that Republicans are not letting the obstructive, negative narrative by Democrats drown out all the positive things that we’ve achieved in New Hampshire.**
****
**Last night we had a phenomenal time with Ari Fleischer at the home of Mary Jane and John Smith. We had a house filled with enthusiastic Republicans who are ready to win big and are excited for 2018.**
****
**And why wouldn’t we be? Thursday morning, Governor Sununu was ranked as the fifth most popular governor in the United States, with 63% of Granite Staters approving of his job performance. **

**The Democrats know they have a massive uphill battle against Governor Sununu, which is why their sacrificial candidate,[Molly Kelly](mollykellynh.com), is already flip-flopping on her past support for a broad-based income or sales tax. **

**[Republicans in New Hampshire are getting the job done](accomplishments.gop), and the New Hampshire Democrats can only obstruct to appease their liberal special interests. **

**Tomorrow, Republicans throughout New Hampshire will be meeting up for a National Day of Action! Go to [action.nh.gop/ndoa ](action.nh.gop/ndoa)****today and sign up for a location near you! Republicans getting out and working towards victory will secure victory in November!**

**Sincerely, **

**Jeanie**

clean_body: | | nh.gop NH REPUBLICAN PARTY WEEKLY NEWSLETTER FRIDAY, APRIL 13TH | A Note From Jeanie Dear Derek, As Governor Sununu says, New Hampshire Republicans get the job done! Wednesday night we had our first open house at NHGOP HQ for those interested in running for office. We had a great turnout! I’m pleased to say that Republicans are not letting the obstructive, negative narrative by Democrats drown out all the positive things that we’ve achieved in New Hampshire. ** Last night we had a phenomenal time with Ari Fleischer at the home of Mary Jane and John Smith. We had a house filled with enthusiastic Republicans who are ready to win big and are excited for 2018. And why wouldn’t we be? Thursday morning, Governor Sununu was ranked as the fifth most popular governor in the United States, with 63% of Granite Staters approving of his job performance. The Democrats know they have a massive uphill battle against Governor Sununu, which is why their sacrificial candidate,mollykellynh.com, is already flip-flopping on her past support for a broad-based income or sales tax. accomplishments.gop, and the New Hampshire Democrats can only obstruct to appease their liberal special interests. Tomorrow, Republicans throughout New Hampshire will be meeting up for a National Day of Action! Go to action.nh.gop/ndoa**today and sign up for a location near you! Republicans getting out and working towards victory will secure victory in November! Sincerely, Jeanie Join the Grassroots Circle! The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party. Becoming a member couldn't be easier -- join today for as little as $10 per month. There are three levels of support: The Grassroots Supporter, the NHGOP Advocate and the VIP Investor. Intern with the NH GOP! Are you a student or know a student that is interested in Politics? ** Learn the skills necessary to win elections and meet the Republican leaders that govern our State and write legislation. PRIORITIES TAX REFORM SPECIFICS EVENT SPOTLIGHT UPCOMING EVENTS PHOTO OF THE WEEK New Hampshire's newest Chief Justice, Robert Lynn, speaking after getting sworn in! REPUBLICAN SPOTLIGHT This week our Republican spotlight is Sarah Stewart! Sarah was confirmed as the Commissioner of the Department of Natural and Cultural Resources unanimously by the Executive Council this week. Sarah will work hard to support and grow our state's creative economy while protecting the forests, lands, and waterways that make our state a great place to live, work, and raise a family. Congratulations, Sarah, and thank you for your hard work! | | Here in Pennsylvania, we know a lot about the consequences of Republican gerrymandering. That's why I am leading the way for a movement to end gerrymandering nationwide. Fair elections are at the very heart of a true democracy. Republicans across the country have been drawing biased voting districts that favor their candidates. In many instances, Democrats don't have a fighting chance. That, is corruption.
